requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (TZS / IEC 60335-2-24 + Montreal/Kigali)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（TZS/IEC 60335-2-24 + 蒙特利尔/基加利）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（TZS/IEC 60335-2-24 + 蒙特利爾/基加利）

summary.en: Tanzania does not operate an EU-style stand-alone F-Gas Regulation. Refrigerant control for household refrigerating appliances is handled in two ways: (1) at the appliance level, the flammable-refrigerant safety requirements of the TZS adopting IEC 60335-2-24 (in particular the charge limits, ventilation and ignition-source provisions of its flammable-refrigerant annex) apply to R-600a (isobutane, GWP approximately 3, ISO 817 classification A3); and (2) at the substance level, Tanzania controls HCFC/HFC import and phase-down as a Party to the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment, administered through the National Ozone Unit under the Vice President's Office / National Environment Management Council (NEMC), typically via import licensing/quota for controlled refrigerant gases rather than product-level prohibitions. For R-600a appliances, the manufacturer must verify the R-600a charge against the IEC 60335-2-24 annex limits and declare the refrigerant type and charge weight (grams) in the product documentation. Conformity is evidenced within the TBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity.
summary.zh: 坦桑尼亚不设欧盟式独立氟气体法规。家用制冷器具的制冷剂管控通过两种方式处理：（1）在器具层面，采用IEC 60335-2-24的TZS标准的可燃制冷剂安全要求（特别是其可燃制冷剂附件的充注量限值、通风及点火源规定）适用于R-600a（异丁烷，GWP约3，ISO 817分类A3）；（2）在物质层面，坦桑尼亚作为《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》缔约方管控HCFC/HFC的进口与削减，由副总统办公室/国家环境管理委员会（NEMC）下属的国家臭氧机构管理，通常通过对受控制冷剂气体的进口许可/配额而非产品层面的禁令实施。对于R-600a器具，制造商须核实R-600a充注量是否符合IEC 60335-2-24附件限值，并在产品文件中声明制冷剂类型及充注量（克）。符合性在TBS PVoC符合性证书内证明。
summary.zht: 坦尚尼亞不設歐盟式獨立氟氣體法規。家用製冷器具的製冷劑管控通過兩種方式處理：（1）在器具層面，採用IEC 60335-2-24的TZS標準的可燃製冷劑安全要求（特別是其可燃製冷劑附件的充注量限值、通風及點火源規定）適用於R-600a（異丁烷，GWP約3，ISO 817分類A3）；（2）在物質層面，坦尚尼亞作為《蒙特利爾議定書》及其《基加利修正案》締約方管控HCFC/HFC的進口與削減，由副總統辦公室/國家環境管理委員會（NEMC）下屬的國家臭氧機構管理，通常通過對受控製冷劑氣體的進口許可/配額而非產品層面的禁令實施。對於R-600a器具，製造商須核實R-600a充注量是否符合IEC 60335-2-24附件限值，並在產品文件中聲明製冷劑類型及充注量（克）。符合性在TBS PVoC符合性證書內證明。

standards_or_laws: TZS adopting IEC 60335-2-24 — flammable-refrigerant annex provisions for R-600a (charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source requirements)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)
Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment — Tanzania HCFC/HFC phase-down via National Ozone Unit (Vice President's Office / NEMC), import licensing/quota for controlled gases

summary.en: China regulates flammable-refrigerant safety at appliance level through GB 4706.13-2014 (which incorporates the R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24). At substance level, China runs its HCFC/HFC phase-down under the Montreal Protocol and the Kigali Amendment (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). GB 9237 (aligned with ISO 5149) covers refrigerating-system safety more generally. Because the Chinese appliance flammability requirements and the Tanzanian TZS both derive from IEC 60335-2-24, the R-600a charge-limit logic is closely aligned; both countries are Montreal Protocol / Kigali Parties operating substance-level phase-down rather than EU-style product F-Gas prohibitions.
summary.zh: 中国在器具层面通过GB 4706.13-2014管控可燃制冷剂安全（其中纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定）。在物质层面，中国依据《蒙特利尔议定书》及《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）执行HCFC/HFC削减，由生态环境部（MEE）管理。GB 9237（参照ISO 5149）更一般地涵盖制冷系统安全。由于中国器具可燃性要求与坦桑尼亚TZS均源自IEC 60335-2-24，R-600a充注量限值逻辑高度一致；两国均为《蒙特利尔议定书》/基加利缔约方，实施物质层面削减而非欧盟式产品氟气体禁令。
summary.zht: 中國在器具層面通過GB 4706.13-2014管控可燃製冷劑安全（其中納入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定）。在物質層面，中國依據《蒙特利爾議定書》及《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）執行HCFC/HFC削減，由生態環境部（MEE）管理。GB 9237（參照ISO 5149）更一般地涵蓋製冷系統安全。由於中國器具可燃性要求與坦尚尼亞TZS均源自IEC 60335-2-24，R-600a充注量限值邏輯高度一致；兩國均為《蒙特利爾議定書》/基加利締約方，實施物質層面削減而非歐盟式產品氟氣體禁令。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable refrigerant (R-600a) provisions for household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment — China HCFC/HFC phase-down (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the gap is documentation and route rather than technology: (1) Charge verification — the R-600a charge must be confirmed against the IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant annex limits as adopted by the Tanzanian TZS; a Chinese CCC test under GB 4706.13 covers the same IEC base but the result must be channelled into the TBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity rather than relied on directly. (2) Documentation — Tanzanian product documentation should state the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane), charge weight in grams, and flammable-refrigerant safety precautions. (3) Substance import controls — any bulk refrigerant gas (for servicing) is subject to Tanzania's Montreal Protocol / Kigali import licensing via the National Ozone Unit, but a sealed R-600a household appliance is regulated at appliance level, not as a controlled-gas import. Tanzania has no EU-style product F-Gas phase-down prohibition list, so R-600a units face no product-level ban; HFC models (e.g. R-134a) are not product-prohibited but the refrigerant gas supply chain is subject to the Kigali phase-down quota.
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，差距在于文件和路径而非技术：（1）充注量核实——R-600a充注量须对照坦桑尼亚TZS所采用的IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂附件限值予以确认；依据GB 4706.13的中国CCC检测涵盖同一IEC基础，但结果须纳入TBS PVoC符合性证书而非直接依赖。（2）文件——坦桑尼亚产品文件应说明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、充注量（克）及可燃制冷剂安全注意事项。（3）物质进口管控——任何散装制冷剂气体（用于维修）受坦桑尼亚《蒙特利尔议定书》/基加利经国家臭氧机构的进口许可约束，但密封的R-600a家用器具按器具层面管理，而非作为受控气体进口。坦桑尼亚没有欧盟式产品氟气体削减禁令清单，故R-600a器具无产品层面禁令；HFC型号（如R-134a）无产品禁令，但其制冷剂气体供应链受基加利削减配额约束。
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，差距在於文件和路徑而非技術：（1）充注量核實——R-600a充注量須對照坦尚尼亞TZS所採用的IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑附件限值予以確認；依據GB 4706.13的中國CCC檢測涵蓋同一IEC基礎，但結果須納入TBS PVoC符合性證書而非直接依賴。（2）文件——坦尚尼亞產品文件應說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、充注量（克）及可燃製冷劑安全注意事項。（3）物質進口管控——任何散裝製冷劑氣體（用於維修）受坦尚尼亞《蒙特利爾議定書》/基加利經國家臭氧機構的進口許可約束，但密封的R-600a家用器具按器具層面管理，而非作為受控氣體進口。坦尚尼亞沒有歐盟式產品氟氣體削減禁令清單，故R-600a器具無產品層面禁令；HFC型號（如R-134a）無產品禁令，但其製冷劑氣體供應鏈受基加利削減配額約束。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via the TZS adopting IEC 60335-2-24 (R-600a flammable-refrigerant charge limits), evidenced within the TBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity; substance-level HCFC/HFC import controlled under Montreal Protocol / Kigali via the National Ozone Unit. No EU-style product F-Gas prohibition list
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is well-positioned for Tanzania: there is no EU-style product F-Gas prohibition, and the appliance-level flammable-refrigerant safety requirement is the TZS adopting IEC 60335-2-24 (the same IEC base as China's GB 4706.13). The manufacturer must verify the R-600a charge against the IEC 60335-2-24 annex limits, document refrigerant type and charge weight, and have it covered within the TBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity. Bulk refrigerant gas for servicing is controlled at substance level under the Montreal Protocol / Kigali Amendment, not at the sealed-appliance level.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a在坦桑尼亚条件良好：无欧盟式产品氟气体禁令，器具层面可燃制冷剂安全要求为采用IEC 60335-2-24的TZS标准（与中国GB 4706.13同一IEC基础）。制造商须核实R-600a充注量是否符合IEC 60335-2-24附件限值，记录制冷剂类型及充注量，并将其纳入TBS PVoC符合性证书。用于维修的散装制冷剂气体在物质层面依《蒙特利尔议定书》/基加利修正案管控，而非在密封器具层面。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a在坦尚尼亞條件良好：無歐盟式產品氟氣體禁令，器具層面可燃製冷劑安全要求為採用IEC 60335-2-24的TZS標準（與中國GB 4706.13同一IEC基礎）。製造商須核實R-600a充注量是否符合IEC 60335-2-24附件限值，記錄製冷劑類型及充注量，並將其納入TBS PVoC符合性證書。用於維修的散裝製冷劑氣體在物質層面依《蒙特利爾議定書》/基加利修正案管控，而非在密封器具層面。
